overview: Having insecurities of being a plus sized person, Sayra an aspiring event planner falls in love with Tahsir. Sooner the story flows, Sayra confronts her past trauma and her esteems falls at stake. She resolute with self-love, respect and her acceptance towards the society challenging the perception of beauty.
